description: Declare dataset type paths metadata and schema fields in a single source of truth
Validate declared schema against real files and detect missing or mismatched fields
Register reusable DuckDB SQL with named runtime parameters and dataset dependencies
Expose validation and query operations through clear command hierarchy
Resolve datasets and parameters without executing SQL for safe inspection
Support json or table output for CI and automation
Optionally validate a random subset of rows for very large files while keeping full validation available
Represent one dataset across many related files using prefix suffix and partition keys
Expose core DuckDB engine settings and extensions in CUE for deterministic CLI behavior across environments
Expose CLI version and build metadata for support and release traceability
Support chunked streaming output for large result sets and pipe-friendly formats like jsonl and csv
Expose optional progress indicators with sensible TTY defaults for long running queries
Provide max rows and timeout controls to prevent runaway queries on very large datasets
Support compressed input datasets such as gzip with explicit or auto compression configuration
